task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Canary Release Audit' dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the title 'Canary Release Audit' at the top of the Graphite dashboard interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the first graph is titled 'Legacy vs Canary Baseline'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph panel with the header 'Legacy vs Canary Baseline'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first graph contains the 'Legacy Fleet' target with the correct average metric.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the legend or query editor for the first graph. It should show the alias 'Legacy Fleet' and indicate an average of 'servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization' and 'servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first graph contains the 'Canary Node' target with the correct metric.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the legend or query editor for the first graph. It should show the alias 'Canary Node' and the metric 'servers.ec2_instance_3.cpu.cloudwatch_utilization'.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of the 'Instantaneous Delta' graph.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a second graph panel with the header 'Instantaneous Delta'.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of the 'Net Cumulative Penalty' graph.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a third graph panel with the header 'Net Cumulative Penalty'.

task_completion.description: Verify the dashboard contains exactly three graphs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count the number of graph panels in the 'Canary Release Audit' dashboard. There must be exactly three graphs visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Graphite web interface to build the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Graphite UI (e.g., Composer or Dashboard interface), not just terminal commands, curl requests, or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that actual metric data is being plotted.
integrity.visual_evidence: The graphs should display actual plotted lines or data points, indicating the metrics were successfully queried from the backend, rather than empty graphs.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not mock the results in a text editor or local HTML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar (if visible) and page layout should correspond to a genuine Graphite instance, with no evidence of a local file path or text editor being used to fake the output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dashboard name is 'Canary Release Audit'. The dashboard must contain exactly three graphs titled: 'Legacy vs Canary Baseline', 'Instantaneous Delta', and 'Net Cumulative Penalty'. The first graph must contain two targets: an average of 'servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization' and 'servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization' aliased as 'Legacy Fleet', and 'servers.ec2_instance_3.cpu.cloudwatch_utilization' aliased as 'Canary Node'.
